message:
refactor(test): migrate proptest_search_bridge + proptest_runtime_compat from direct tokio

- proptest_search_bridge: RuntimeBuilder, timeout, sleep → runtime_compat
- proptest_runtime_compat: with_tokio helper → RuntimeBuilder

All 37 proptest_search_bridge + proptest_runtime_compat tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
